title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Below Required
scenario: Poly Studio Mobile app shows limited support pop-up when newly released device is connected to an older app version that does not support it
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Ensure the app version is an older build that does not yet support a newly released Poly Bluetooth audio device.
3. Verify the current date is on or after the newly released device's official launch date.
4. Power on the newly released Poly Bluetooth audio device and place it in pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button).
5. On the Poly Studio Mobile app Home screen, tap "Add Device" or scan for nearby devices.
6. Connect to the newly released device from the list of available devices.
7. Observe the connection status icon on the Home screen or Device Settings screen.
8. Note the green ring around the connection status icon and the "i" icon displayed in the top right corner.
9. Tap the "i" icon in the top right corner.
10. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
11. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The app displays a green ring around the connection status icon and an "i" icon in the top right corner. Tapping the "i" icon shows a pop-up message: "Device support is limited. Update the Poly Lens Mobile app to enable full functionality." Tapping outside the pop-up closes it.
